articles.headline: Codex App Updated
articles.summary: The Codex app has been updated with new features including computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins. These updates aim to accelerate developer workflows. The addition of these features expands the capabilities of the Codex app, making it a more comprehensive tool for developers. The update is available for both macOS and Windows.
articles.impact: This update provides AI agent builders with a more robust toolset for streamlining their development processes, potentially increasing productivity and efficiency. The inclusion of features like image generation and plugins can also enable more complex and creative applications.
